onboardingProvider.title: Onboarding Provider
onboardingProvider.description: Route-level onboarding gate that checks tenant completion state and redirects incomplete tenants into the wizard

onboardingWizard.title: Onboarding Wizard
onboardingWizard.description: Wizard shell for MSP tenant setup with dialog/full-page presentation, progress, validation, and completion flows

shell.title: Setup Your System
shell.description: Let's get your workspace configured and ready to use.

addClientStep.title: Add Client Step
addClientStep.description: Wizard step for creating or revisiting the primary client record during onboarding

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

website.example: Please enter a valid website (e.g., example.com)
website.format: Please enter a valid website format

header.title: Add Your First Client
header.description: Let's add your first client to get started. You can skip this and add clients later.

created.title: Client created successfully!
created.description: {{clientName}} has been added to your client list.

note.defaultTaxSettings: The client will be created with default non-taxable (0%) tax settings. You can configure tax rates later in the client settings.
note.optional: You can skip this step and add clients later from your dashboard.

billingSetupStep.title: Billing Setup Step
billingSetupStep.description: Wizard step for defining the initial service, pricing, billing mode, and contract line defaults

errors.duplicate: Service type with this name already exists
errors.createRetry: Failed to create service type. Please try again.

serviceTypes.description: Service types are taxonomy labels for organization and filtering. Billing mode is configured separately on each service.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which service types appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

import.title: Import Standard Service Types
import.description: Select standard service types to import into your system:

header.title: Create Your First Service
header.description: Add a service and choose how it should be billed. Service type identifies the service category, while billing mode controls pricing behavior.
header.serviceDescription: Add a service and choose how it should be billed. Service type identifies the service category, while billing mode controls pricing behavior.

created.title: Service created successfully!
created.description: {{serviceName}} has been added to your service catalog.

serviceDescription.label: Service Description
serviceDescription.placeholder: Comprehensive IT support and management services...

serviceType.label: Service Type *
serviceType.emptyHelp: Click "Manage Service Types" to create or import service types

defaultCurrency.label: Default Currency *
defaultCurrency.description: This currency will be used as the default across all billing — services, contracts, quotes, and invoices. You can override it per client later.

validation.actionRequiredDescription: Click "Manage Service Types" above to create or import at least one service type before creating a service.

clientContactStep.title: Client Contact Step
clientContactStep.description: Wizard step for collecting the main client contact details

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

empty.title: Client Contact
empty.description: No client information was provided. Skip this step or go back to add a client first.

header.title: Add Contact for {{clientName}}
header.description: Add a primary contact person for this client.

footer.optional: You can skip this step and add contacts later from the client's profile.

clientInfoStep.title: Client Info Step
clientInfoStep.description: Wizard step for collecting MSP operator identity, company information, and initial client basics

revisit.title: Company Information
revisit.description: Review or update your company details.
revisit.note: You can use this wizard to reconfigure your workspace settings at any time.

header.title: Client Information
header.description: Let's start by setting up your client profile.

email.label: Email Address
email.help: This will be used for signing in to your account.

language.label: Language
language.help: Becomes the organization default for everyone — MSP staff and client portal users. Individual users and clients can override it later.

resetRequired.title: Password Reset Required
resetRequired.description: You must set a new password to continue with the setup process. This step cannot be skipped.

password.title: Set Your Password
password.description: Please set a new password to replace your temporary password.

footer.note: All fields on this page are required to proceed.

teamMembersStep.title: Team Members Step
teamMembersStep.description: Wizard step for inviting initial team members and assigning onboarding roles

license.limitReached: License limit reached ({{current}}/{{limit}}). Contact support to increase your license limit.

remaining.one: You can add 1 more team member.
remaining.other: You can add {{count}} more team members.

errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields including password
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long

header.title: Invite Team Members
header.description: Add your team members to get them started. You can skip this step and add them later.

password.label: Temporary Password
password.help: The user will need to change this password on first login

unsaved.title: Unsaved team member
unsaved.description: Please save the current team member before adding a new one.

limitReached.title: User limit reached
limitReached.description: You've reached the maximum number of users for your current plan. Contact support to increase your limit.

optional.label: Optional:
optional.description: You can skip this step and invite team members later from the settings page.

ticketingConfigStep.title: Ticketing Config Step
ticketingConfigStep.description: Wizard step for configuring boards, statuses, priorities, categories, and SLA defaults during onboarding

toasts.firstDefaultSet: First board automatically set as default

errors.defaultRequired: At least one board must be set as default
errors.create: Failed to create board. Please try again.

boards.title: Boards
boards.description: Boards help organize tickets by department, team, or workflow type. When clients create tickets through the client portal, they will automatically be assigned to the board marked as default.
boards.tip: Click the star in the Default column to change which board is the default.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which boards appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

import.title: Import Standard Categories

targetBoard.label: Target Board *
targetBoard.placeholder: Select a board for imported categories
targetBoard.help: All imported categories will be assigned to this board

import.parentAutoSelectTitle: Parent category will be automatically selected

errors.missingParents: Cannot import subcategories without their parent categories. Please also select: {{parents}}
errors.duplicate: Category already exists in this board
errors.create: Failed to create category. Please try again.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Categories help organize tickets by type of issue or request. You can create parent categories with subcategories for better organization. Examples include Technical Support (with subcategories like Hardware, Software, Network) or Service Requests.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which categories appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

toasts.firstDefaultSet: First open status automatically set as default

errors.defaultRequired: At least one status must be set as default
errors.closedCannotBeDefault: Closed statuses cannot be set as default
errors.selectBoardForDefault: Select or create a board before changing status defaults.
errors.selectBoardForAdd: Select or create a board before adding statuses.
errors.create: Failed to create status. Please try again.

statuses.title: Statuses
statuses.description: Statuses are configured per board. Select a board below to define the lifecycle for tickets on that board. The Default open status for the selected board is automatically assigned to new tickets created on that board.
statuses.tip: Boards do not share statuses. Switch boards here to review or change each board's status set.
statuses.noBoardWarning: Create or import a board before configuring statuses. Each board needs its own open default status.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which statuses appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

state.closedHelp: This status indicates the ticket is resolved and closed
state.openHelp: This status indicates the ticket is still open and needs attention

empty.forBoard: {{boardName}} does not have any statuses yet. Add or import at least one open default status before completing onboarding.
empty.noBoardSelected: Select a board to configure its statuses.

errors.missingSession: User session not found. Please refresh and try again.
errors.create: Failed to create priority. Please try again.

priorities.title: Priorities
priorities.description: Priorities help determine the urgency of tickets and service level agreements (SLAs). Each priority has a color for quick visual identification. Typical priorities include Critical (red), High (orange), Medium (blue), and Low (green).

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order in which priorities appear in dropdown menus throughout the platform. Lower numbers appear first.

errors.validateDeletion: Failed to validate deletion. Please try again.

header.title: Configure Ticketing System
header.description: Set up your support ticketing system. Import standard configurations or create your own.

numbering.title: Ticket Numbering
numbering.description: Configure how ticket numbers are generated. Each ticket will have a unique identifier consisting of an optional prefix and a sequential number with optional zero-padding.

prefix.label: Ticket Prefix
prefix.help: Optional. Leave empty for no prefix or enter a custom prefix (e.g., "TK-", "TICKET-")

paddingLength.label: Padding Length
paddingLength.help: Minimum total digits. E.g., 6 makes "1" become "000001"

actions.openReference: View ITIL categories and priority matrix

explanation.impact: Impact: How many users/business functions are affected?
explanation.urgency: Urgency: How quickly does this need to be resolved?
explanation.priority: Priority: Automatically calculated based on Impact × Urgency matrix above.

supportEmail.label: Support Email
supportEmail.help: This email address will be used to create support tickets. Emails sent to this address will automatically generate tickets in your system.

finalRequirement.label: Required:
finalRequirement.description: Please configure at least one board and one priority to complete setup. Import standard configurations to quickly set up your ticketing system.
